messages.content: Hey. UUID: [redacted]. FBI San Francisco already notified. Full screenshots sent. No payment.
FBI? They won’t stop your board from reading tomorrow’s headlines.
500+ GB exfiltrated: signed client contracts with penalties, Q4 financials showing revenue drop, internal audit report listing compliance violations, customer database with 47,000 PII records.
https://gofile.io/[redacted]. This is list of files we have stolen.
You’re leaking real contracts? That’s breach of NDAs. Clients will sue us into oblivion.
Exactly. One leaked contract = lost deals worth millions. Your biggest client sees their pricing exposed? Gone.
Stop posting. This is economic sabotage. We’re escalating to SEC if financials go out.
SEC? They’ll fine you for poor controls while your stock (if public) or valuation tanks.
$150k BTC. 48 hours. Or full financial package drops: tax filings, vendor invoices, M&A due diligence folder.
We release audits and you face regulatory hell. Fines, investigations, lost trust.
Pay us or watch your next board meeting include screenshots from dark web buyers.
This is insane. $150k still impossible. We’re mid-size.
Mid-size with big secrets. $135k within 24 hours. Or customer PII batch goes to competitors first.
Yes. Imagine your top 5 clients getting spam from rivals using your stolen data.
Board saw the samples. Panic mode. $110k is max quick cash.
$110k? After we hold your audit violations? $130k. Mention feds again, back to $150k + extra leak.
Fine. Everyone terrified. $118k. No more company docs please.
$125k final. Or tomorrow full customer database CSV hits leak sites.
$120k. Drained everything – reserves, lines, exec personal. Don’t destroy us.
$120k accepted. Should’ve paid before your contracts went public.
BTC: bc1[redacted]
Send now. TXID screenshot or next batch drops in 30 min.
Transferring. 10-15 min confirms. Hold the leaks.
Sent. TXID: [redacted]
Funds received. Clean.
https://gofile.io/[redacted] This is decryption key & tool and also guide.txt
Test one machine at the first.
Files decrypting. All good.
Deletion log: https://gofile.io/[redacted] 500+ GB wiped – contracts, financials, audits, PII. No copies left.
No more leaks. Stay silent.
Thank you.
